scripts.cape:pull:
node -e "console.error('
[cape:pull] Run this manually — see README.
  1. Fill CAPE_EMAIL, CAPE_PASSWORD, CAPE_DEFAULT_CAMPAIGN_ID in .env
  2. cd /path/to/lwg-cli-cape
  3. node cli.js login
  4. node cli.js fetch $CAPE_DEFAULT_CAMPAIGN_ID
'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.check-env:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const e=fs.existsSync('.env')?Object.fromEntries(fs.readFileSync('.env','utf8').split('
').filter(l=>l&&!l.startsWith('#')).map(l=>l.split('='))):{}; const required=['NEXT_PUBLIC_CAPE_URL','NEXT_PUBLIC_CAPE_CAMPAIGN_ID','API_URL','SERVER_SECRET']; const missing=required.filter(k=>!e[k]||e[k].trim()===''); if(missing.length){console.error('
[check-env] Missing required vars:
'+missing.map(k=>'  ✘ '+k).join('
')+'
');process.exit(1)}else{console.log('[check-env] All required vars present ✔')}"
